# protonpass_item (Resource)

Manages a generic Proton Pass item (e.g. login, note, identity, etc).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example 1: Create a Login Item
resource "protonpass_item" "example_login" {
  share_id            = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type                = "login"
  title               = "My Login"
  username            = "user"
  password_wo         = "secret"
  urls                = ["https://example.com"]
  destroy_permanently = true
}

# Example 2: Create a Note Item
resource "protonpass_item" "example_note" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type     = "note"
  title    = "My Note"
  note_wo  = "This is a super secret note."
}

# Example 3: Create a Credit Card Item
resource "protonpass_item" "example_card" {
  share_id        = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type            = "credit-card"
  title           = "Company Card"
  cardholder_name = "Jane Doe"
  number          = "4111222233334444"
  expiration_date = "2030-12"
  pin             = "1234"
}

# Example 4: Create a WiFi Item
resource "protonpass_item" "example_wifi" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type     = "wifi"
  title    = "Office Guest WiFi"
  ssid     = "Guest-Net"
  password = "guest-password"
  security = "WPA2"
}

# Example 5: Generate an SSH Key
resource "protonpass_item" "example_ssh_gen" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type     = "ssh-key"
  title    = "Generated Deploy Key"
  generate = true # This will let the provider generate the key pair
}

# Example 6: Create an Identity Item
resource "protonpass_item" "example_identity" {
  share_id  = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  type      = "identity"
  title     = "Jane Doe Identity"
  full_name = "Jane Doe"
  email     = "jane.doe@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String) The share ID of the vault containing this item.
- `title` (String) The title of the item.
- `type` (String) The item type: `login`, `note`, `credit-card`, `wifi`, `ssh-key`, or `identity`.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `birthdate` (String) Birthdate for identity items.
- `cardholder_name` (String) Cardholder name for credit card items.
- `city` (String) City for identity items.
- `comment` (String) Comment for SSH key generation.
- `company` (String) Company name for identity items.
- `country_or_region` (String) Country or region for identity items.
- `destroy_permanently` (Boolean) If true, the item is permanently deleted on destroy instead of being moved to trash.
- `email` (String) Email address for login or identity items.
- `expiration_date` (String) Expiration date for credit card items (format: `YYYY-MM`).
- `first_name` (String) First name for identity items.
- `full_name` (String) Full name for identity items.
- `gender` (String) Gender for identity items.
- `generate` (Boolean) If true, generates a new SSH key pair.
- `job_title` (String) Job title for identity items.
- `key_type` (String) Key type for SSH key generation (e.g. `ed25519`).
- `last_name` (String) Last name for identity items.
- `license_number` (String, Sensitive) License number for identity items.
- `license_number_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Write-only license number.
- `license_number_wo_version` (Number) Version counter for `license_number_wo`.
- `middle_name` (String) Middle name for identity items.
- `note` (String, Sensitive) Note content.
- `note_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Write-only note content.
- `note_wo_version` (Number) Version counter for `note_wo`. Increment to trigger a note update.
- `number` (String, Sensitive) Card number for credit card items.
- `organization` (String) Organization for identity items.
- `passport_number` (String, Sensitive) Passport number for identity items.
- `passport_number_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Write-only passport number.
- `passport_number_wo_version` (Number) Version counter for `passport_number_wo`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for login or WiFi items.
- `password_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Write-only password. Use this instead of `password` to avoid storing the password in state.
- `password_wo_version` (Number) Version counter for `password_wo`. Increment to trigger a password update.
- `phone_number` (String) Phone number for identity items.
- `pin` (String, Sensitive) PIN for credit card items.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) Private key for SSH key items.
- `public_key` (String) Public key for SSH key items.
- `security` (String) Security type for WiFi items (e.g. `WPA2`, `WPA3`).
- `ssid` (String) SSID for WiFi items.
- `ssn` (String, Sensitive) Social Security Number for identity items.
- `ssn_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Write-only SSN. Use this instead of `ssn` to avoid storing it in state.
- `ssn_wo_version` (Number) Version counter for `ssn_wo`.
- `state_or_province` (String) State or province for identity items.
- `street_address` (String) Street address for identity items.
- `urls` (List of String) List of URLs associated with the login item.
- `username` (String) Username for login items.
- `verification_number` (String, Sensitive) CVV/verification number for credit card items.
- `website` (String) Website URL for identity items.
- `work_email` (String) Work email for identity items.
- `work_phone_number` (String) Work phone number for identity items.
- `zip_or_postal_code` (String) ZIP or postal code for identity items.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Timestamp when the item was created.
- `item_id` (String) The unique identifier of the item.
- `modify_time` (String) Timestamp when the item was last modified.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Items can be imported using the vault share_id and the item_id, separated by a colon.
terraform import protonpass_item.example "share_id:item_id"
```
